features: This microbiome deodorant roll on has an advanced formula to fight odour causing bacteria & respect good bacteria without irritations
Help underarm skin perform at its healthy best
Recycle the bottle with the cap on
description: Product Description Healthy, protected underarm skin starts with the new Sanex BiomeProtect Dermo Anti-Irritation Deodorant Roll On. This microbiome deodorant roll on has an advanced formula to fight odour causing bacteria & respect good bacteria without irritations. Help underarm skin perform at its healthy best. Ingredients AQUA, PPG-15 STEARYL ETHER, STEARETH-2, GLYCERIN, SCENT, STEARETH-21, LACTIC ACID, SODIUM LACTATE, CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, SODIUM BENZOATE, INULIN, CALCIUM SILICATE, BUTYLOCTANOL.

specifications_table.Special Features: Advanced Odor-Fighting Formula with Prebiotic Complex
